package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_lazy_loading_eager_connect_to_all_backends: Layer: Lazy loading. Flag services connecting to every optional backend at startup instead of lazy initialization.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule554PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario554Positive(records []Rule554PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
